mapper.insert: insert into shanny_blog.articles(category_id, content, memo, create_time, href, image, published, tags, timelines, title, type, update_time, views) values (#{categoryId}, #{content}, #{memo}, #{createTime}, #{href}, #{image}, #{published}, #{tags}, #{timelines}, #{title}, #{type}, #{updateTime}, #{views})
mapper.update: UPDATE shanny_blog.articles SET views = #{views} WHERE id = #{id}
